tasks.title: Add plan validations
tasks.split_reason: Original FE spec (~33K tokens) caused context exhaustion. Split into 4 sequential FE parts with human checkpoints. Plan Library (Trigger 2) extracted to FE-D due to complex multi-plan 3-step flow.

4.name: End-to-end on running system
4.summary: 21 PASS, 3 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 9 BLOCKED / 33 total. Delta vs round 1: +10 PASS, +1 PARTIAL (S17 reclassified), −2 FAIL (resolved), −9 BLOCKED. All FAIL resolved. Remaining BLOCKED cluster is S2-S8/S31 (AddPlan wizard full-fill past renewal-field intercept — test tooling) and S13 (deferred destructive). S1/S17/S17b PARTIAL tied to same wizard-fill budget. Gate 4 spec critical paths all verified via Playwright end-to-end.
4.primary_blocker: No remaining FAIL. Primary open items: (1) S2-S8/S31 BLOCKED on full AddPlan wizard fill (test tooling scope, ~2h); (2) S1/S17 PARTIAL also tied to wizard fill; (3) S13 deferred destructive (covered indirectly by S11/S14).
secondary_blockers: S12 BLOCKED: DB has seed-offer-techcorp-renewal-med.visibleToEmployer=true (verified by verify-seed.py) but UI renders no REVIEWED tag on Carrier Offers / carrier/medical. REVIEWED→NEEDS REVIEW transition cannot be asserted without baseline tag. Either visibleToEmployer isn't the driver, or an additional state change is needed.

S15/S16 PARTIAL: Dental+vision renewal offers have quotePlanMapping entries (3 each) in DB but they don't resolve back to the employer's system plan IDs — delete modal falls through to simpler (unmapped) variant. Seed mapping needs to include system-plan IDs (Delta Dental PPO, Cigna DHMO, VSP Choice Plan, EyeMed Select) on the mapping targets.

S17 BLOCKED: No plan exists on PY-2025 or PY-2027 for TechCorp to exercise the TO-current direction. Clone Effective Dates dropdown still doesn't offer PY-2025 (only PY-2027 future + PY-2026 current). Seed a plan on non-current PY or expand the dropdown filter.

S2-S8 / S31 BLOCKED: Reaching the 3 sync-modal buttons from the AddPlan wizard requires filling Monthly Premiums + Enrollments on tabs 2+7 of the 8-tab form; full end-to-end fill is beyond the 2-round debug cap per scenario. S1's intercept + S23/S26 direct-save prove the AddPlan code path is functional end-to-end.

progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.phase_a_migrations_landed: All Phase A Java @ChangeUnit migrations + seed fixes live (platform HEAD 2ea5551081). verify-seed.py ALL SEED DATA PRESENT.
progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.s1_crash_verification: AddPlan.tsx handlePlanSave crash (TypeError: validate is not a function) is definitively fixed. useRenewalFieldValidation intercept fires correctly on incomplete plans. S23/S26 (SmallBiz + LG-NoRenewal) PASS end-to-end prove the save path works when not intercepted.
progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.last_plan_blocker_verification: S19 (TechCorp Life), S20 (Go Back), S27 (lgfin Medical) all PASS with correct last-plan-of-LOC blocker modal. useStructuralSyncDelete wiring confirmed.
progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.py2027_clone_dropdown: PY-2027 now offered in Clone + Edit Basic Plan Info Effective Dates dropdowns (S10, S18 PASS). PY-2025 still absent — separate filter pass needed to unblock S17.
progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.delete_mapped_unmapped_variants: S11 (Blue Shield, mapped) + S11b (Aetna, unmapped) + S14 (Go Back) + S22/S28/S29/S30 blockers all PASS — SyncRenewalConfirmationModal + blocker-modal wiring is solid.
progress_2026_04_20_phaseB.outstanding_to_pass_gate4: Fix S21 reset navigation target; seed or map REVIEWED tag source for S12; fix dental/vision quotePlanMapping for S15/S16; seed non-current-PY plan for S17; optionally script a full AddPlan wizard fill to capture S2-S8/S31 sync-modal screenshots.

4.action_plan_ref: planyear-harness PR #118 + commit on e2e/PY-12388-test-run-20260420 branch with Phase B evidence (test-record.md, e2e-results.json, screenshots/)

checks.desc: Step 1: RenewalInfoVO.tierType populated correctly per benefitCategory (3 unit tests + 1 integration)

Step 2: TierMismatchException thrown/not-thrown correctly (5 unit tests + 6 integration tests — covers LG MEDICAL 422, LG DENTAL 422, LG VISION 422, no-renewal pass, SG MEDICAL excluded for both SG subtypes)

Step 2 R6: All 6 resources return HTTP 422 on mismatched tier — POST and PUT. DentalResource + DentalLibraryPlanResource (dental mismatch); VisionResource + VisionPlanLibraryResource (vision mismatch); MedicalLibraryPlanResource (medical mismatch). MedicalResource covered by V4.
Step 3: Document extraction tier defaulting (4 unit tests)
V3: GET /v1/renewals/system-plan-sync/active-renewal-info returns tierType for MEDICAL, DENTAL, VISION (3 checks)
V4: POST and PUT medical plan with mismatched premiumType (N_TIER vs FOUR_TIER renewal) → 422 with exact C2 payload on both verbs (edit plan rates is a PUT; create is a POST)
V7: SG Medical exclusion live check — POST and PUT medical plan with mismatched premiumType on SG employer (renewalType=SMALL_GROUP_NON_NY_VT) → 200 (no 422; guardrail does not apply to SG Medical)
Human checkpoint: spec-vs-actual contract comparison (gate1-spec-vs-actual.txt). Verify C1 tierType field and C2 422 response match spec shapes. Approve to unblock FE.
Step 4: 4 Vitest tests for getPremiumTypeLockdown helper + getDefaultPlanRates

8 unit + 14 component Vitest tests (includes LG/SG scope tests, non-current plan year regression, UPDATE_SYSTEM_PLAN field hidden, CREATE_SYSTEM_PLAN shown+locked, SG DV locked, DBG view, and warning banner assertions)

Playwright MCP visual spot-check on 13 states: (1) medical add LG locked+banner; (2) Rates edit medical locked+banner; (3) Rates edit dental locked+banner; (4) Rates edit vision locked+banner; (5) dental add LG locked+banner; (6) vision add LG locked+banner; (7) plan library import locked+banner; (8) BC add/plan-year-change RatesEnrollmentModalContent locked+banner; (9) medical add no renewal → editable no banner; (10) UPDATE_SYSTEM_PLAN field hidden (no regression); (11) DBG view locked+banner; (12) CREATE_SYSTEM_PLAN shown+locked+banner; (13) SG dental+vision locked, SG medical editable
Stories load for each flow in active-renewal and no-renewal variants; data-testid "premium-type" present on each; no console errors

Human checkpoint: 13 Playwright screenshots side-by-side. Approve: medical/dental/vision add+edit locked with yellow banner; library import locked; BC add modal locked; no-renewal editable; UPDATE_SYSTEM_PLAN field hidden; DBG locked; CREATE_SYSTEM_PLAN shown+locked; SG dental+vision locked, SG medical editable.

Precondition: Seed env started. Required data: (1) seed-employer-techcorp (LG, renewalType=LARGE_GROUP) with active MDV renewal (medicalTierType=FOUR_TIER, dentalTierType+visionTierType also set), >=1 medical/dental/vision plan on current plan year, plus >=1 medical, >=1 dental, and >=1 vision plan on a future plan year (for E2E #12 — MDV all), and at least 1 Life or Voluntary plan type available to add (for E2E #13); (2) SG employer (seed as renewalType=SMALL_GROUP_NON_NY_VT; rule applies equally to SMALL_GROUP_NY_VT) with active DENTAL + VISION renewal (dentalTierType=TWO_TIER, visionTierType also set) and >=1 dental plan + >=1 vision plan + >=1 medical plan (for E2E #11 SG DV locked on dental+vision + SG medical excluded checks). Seed users already exist via BrokerEmployerLoginSeedDataMigration.
Create medical plan, active renewal: Premium Type dropdown disabled, value = FOUR_TIER, plan saves
Edit medical plan Rates form, active renewal: Premium Type read-only, value matches renewal tier
Create dental plan, active renewal: Premium Type read-only, value matches renewal dentalTierType (dental entry point)
Create medical plan, no active renewal: Premium Type editable, any tier choosable, saves (regression)

Direct API call bypassing FE — POST and PUT: (a) curl POST /v1/plans/medical with mismatched premiumType → HTTP 422 with C2 payload (create path); (b) curl PUT /v1/plans/medical/{id} with mismatched premiumType on an existing plan → HTTP 422 with C2 payload (edit plan rates path)
Plan library import, active renewal: Premium Type in import review is read-only and matches renewal tier; on save, plan stored at renewal's tier
BC add / plan year change (future to current), active renewal: RatesEnrollmentModalContent Premium Type field is read-only and pre-selected to renewal tier

Update plan parameter flow (doc extraction review): AddPlanModal is opened with docExtractionSource prop set (source=UPDATE_SYSTEM_PLAN, planId, planName) by the caller — isFromUpdatePan=!isEmpty(docExtractionSource)=true — hidePremiumType={isFromUpdatePan}=true — field hidden. Out of scope for lockdown, no FE change needed.
DBG (Benefit Guide) plan edit, active renewal: Premium Type read-only, shows renewal tier, warning banner above it

CREATE_SYSTEM_PLAN doc extraction, active renewal: Premium Type IS shown (docExtractionSource not set in AddPlan for this flow → isFromUpdatePan=false), disabled, value = renewal tier, warning banner above it. Standard getPremiumTypeLockdown wiring covers this path — no hidePremiumType change needed.

SG employer (seed as renewalType=SMALL_GROUP_NON_NY_VT; rule applies equally to SMALL_GROUP_NY_VT — both excluded via != LARGE_GROUP check) with active DENTAL + VISION renewal (dentalTierType=TWO_TIER, visionTierType also set): (a) add dental plan → Premium Type disabled, value=TWO_TIER, banner visible; (b) add vision plan → Premium Type disabled, value=renewal visionTierType, banner visible (SG DV applies to vision); (c) add medical plan for same SG employer → Premium Type editable, no banner (SG Medical excluded for both SMALL_GROUP_NY_VT and SMALL_GROUP_NON_NY_VT)

Multi-plan-year MDV — current PY locked, future PY editable: LG employer with active MDV renewal (FOUR_TIER). (a) Add Plan > Medical, select current plan year → Premium Type locked, banner visible. (b) Switch plan year selector to future plan year in the same form → Premium Type immediately editable, banner disappears (reactive lockdown). (c) Repeat for dental. (d) Edit an existing medical plan on the future plan year → Premium Type editable, no banner. Confirms isPlanYearCurrent reactive logic; guardrail does not bleed across plan years.

Non-MDV plans (Life/Voluntary) with active MDV renewal: Same LG employer with active MDV renewal. (a) Add a Life plan → no Premium Type field rendered; form saves without error; no banner. (b) curl POST /v1/plans/life (or Voluntary equivalent) with any premiumType → no 422 (non-MDV resources excluded from BE validator). Confirms Non-MDV Out of Scope rule holds at both FE and BE.

Create vision plan, active renewal: LG employer with active VISION renewal (visionTierType set). Add Plan > Vision. Premium Type dropdown is disabled, value matches renewal visionTierType, warning banner visible. Plan saves successfully. Confirms vision create entry point is covered alongside medical (#1) and dental (#3).
Review Gate 3 agent results (14/14 E2E scenarios passed)

Spot-check: Premium Type read-only with yellow warning banner across LG MDV + SG DV entry points when renewal active (LG: medical create, dental create, vision create, Rates edit, BC add/plan-year-change modal, doc extraction CREATE flow, DBG plan edit; SG: dental + vision)
Spot-check: SG Medical is NOT locked — Premium Type editable even when SG employer has an active renewal
Spot-check: no regressions in plan create/edit flows when no renewal exists
Spot-check: curl POST and PUT /v1/plans/medical (LG employer) with mismatched premiumType returns HTTP 422 with the C2 payload. Confirm same curl for SG employer returns 200 (not 422).
Confirm migration scope is properly routed to PY-12729 (no migration UX accidentally built into PY-12334)

Spot-check: update plan parameter (UPDATE_SYSTEM_PLAN) flow. Premium Type field stays hidden (docExtractionSource prop set when modal opens → isFromUpdatePan=true → hidePremiumType={isFromUpdatePan}=true — out of scope for lockdown; no regression introduced)
